attacking_style: Not an attacker; sprinter who relies on positioning in finale but struggles with consistent execution and tactical discipline in chaotic sprint scenarios.
team_tactics: Benefits from leadout positioning but appears to lack dedicated train support, leaving him exposed to navigate final meters independently with mixed results.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint finishes after long stages, though execution quality deteriorates significantly after 200+ km efforts when acceleration is required.
vulnerability: Sprint discipline and positioning judgment under pressure; fades when requiring late acceleration after extended stages; rule violations in chaotic finales.
key_patterns: Positioning advantage deteriorates in final execution phase of sprints (2 instances)
Struggles to convert good position into results after 200km+ stages (2 instances)
Decision-making under sprint pressure leads to costly errors including disqualifications (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: showed regression from 2021 winning position to 2022 fade, indicating declining sprint punch or confidence
